description: If two things are true, then the second thing is also true.

hints.text: This is the mirror image of the last problem. The goal is $A \land B \to B$ — it should feel just as obvious. Start exactly the same way: assume the [conjunction|conjunction].
Last time you used `and-elim-l` to get the left half. This time you need the **other** side. Which [elimination-rule|elimination rule] takes the right half?
Now discharge the [assumption|assumption] to finish the [implication|implication].
